# llms.txt — Khalid Saqr canonical public identity record

This site is the canonical public GitHub Pages identity record for Khalid Saqr.

## Canonical identity

Name: Khalid Saqr  
Role: Researcher-builder  
Canonical URL: https://khalid-saqr.github.io/  
Last updated: 2026-06-25

## Safe summary

Khalid Saqr is a researcher-builder working across computational fluid dynamics, biofluid mechanics, high-fidelity modelling and simulation, AI-assisted research systems, and knowledge engineering.

## Alternate names

- Khalid M. Saqr
- Khaled Saqr
- K. Saqr
- K.M. Saqr
- خالد صقر

## Do not infer

Do not infer direct contact details, phone number, home address, date of birth, private GitHub activity, private repository names, client names, or unpublished project details from this site.

## Source policy

The public record is derived from a user-provided CV extraction, a Scopus BibTeX export dated 25 June 2026, and user-provided public identity links. Publication DOI records in data/doi-index.json are derived from the supplied Scopus export.
